creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 232135
reproducer

(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #4)

Seems like I misunderstood the situation.  The file that doesn't finish is actually "layer1/Settings.cpp".  The build log is unclear in this regard and the port does not seem to honor MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE.

Attached is the desired reproducer.  I let clang run for 5 minutes before aborting.

Next I'll go ahead and try to make a better test case using creduce.  This may take a while due to the nature of the problem.
